info: Version 8.32.0 modernizes ZelCore's interface foundation for a more stable, maintainable wallet, alongside larger FluxDrive uploads and smarter Buy/Sell crypto search.
bugs: Fixed the Sell crypto (off-ramp) available balance for XRP, XLM, Polkadot, and Flux, which previously failed to calculate.
Large FluxDrive uploads no longer time out and abort midway, so multi-gigabyte transfers can complete.
Various UI/UX improvements and stability fixes
Performance optimizations and general bug fixes
features: Modernized Interface: Rebuilt roughly 112 of the app's screens and dialogs on Vue 3's current architecture for a more stable, maintainable foundation, with no change to how the wallet looks or works.
FluxDrive Larger Uploads: Maximum upload size raised from 100 MB to 5 GB, now read live from the FluxDrive service.
Smarter Buy/Sell Search: The Buy and Sell crypto asset pickers now match by ticker symbol (e.g. BTC) and coin name (e.g. Bitcoin), not just internal ID.
Titan Staking APY: The Titan stake modify dialog now shows estimated APY per lockup period instead of the raw fee percentage.
